name: Creme De Menthe Truffle Cups
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Semisweet chocolate, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Betty Crocker's Cookbook
Heat candy coating in a double boiler over hot water until melted. Spread 1 teaspoon of coating evenly on the bottoms and up the sides of paper candy cups. Let set until hard.
Heat chocolate in a heavy 2 quart saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly, until melted; remove from heat. Stir in the remaining ingredients. Refrigerate about 25 minutes, stirring frequently, or until the mixture is thick and mounds when dropped from a spoon. Spoon the mixture into a decorating bag with a star tip. Pipe the mixture into the candy-coated cups. Refrigerate about 30 minutes or until the chocolate mixture is firm. Peel the paper from the cups before serving if desired.
